title: HIGGSFIELD_CALL_RECEIPT_V1
description: Per-shot receipt emitted when the higgsfield_seedance skill calls the Higgsfield API. NON_SOVEREIGN. TEMPLE/subsandbox only. Never admitted to town/ledger_v1.ndjson. Proposal-class draft staged in experiments/ pending MAYOR admission to helen_os/schemas/.

ref_image_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the canonical character reference image bound to this shot.

prompt.description: Text prompt sent to Higgsfield Seedance2 for this shot.

prompt_hash.description: SHA-256 of canonical-encoded prompt for determinism tracking.

seed.description: Deterministic seed sent to the API. Per-shot, per storyboard.

returned_url.description: URL where Higgsfield returned the rendered mp4. Empty in DRY_RUN mode.

mp4_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the downloaded mp4. Empty in DRY_RUN mode.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the API call (or DRY_RUN simulation).

scope.description: Locked: this receipt class can only be emitted in TEMPLE/subsandbox scope. Sovereign chat surfaces must not produce it.

sovereign_admitted.description: Locked false. This receipt is never sovereign-admitted. If a future surface needs sovereign admission, declare a separate schema.

mode.description: Optional: DRY_RUN if the call was mocked (offline test), LIVE if the real Higgsfield API was hit. Absent = LIVE for backward-compat.

error.description: Optional: present only on failed calls. Recorded for debugging; failed calls still emit a receipt.
